subject: GREEN — BOTH tags live + public on GHCR. Go verify. (v0.3.0-cu124 + v0.3.0-cu128)
body:
Final ping. Both image tags are now LIVE and the GHCR package is PUBLIC — RunPod can pull both:

  ghcr.io/madponyinteractive/cubric-vision-pod:v0.3.0-cu124  (Ampere/Ada/Hopper; broad host compat)
  ghcr.io/madponyinteractive/cubric-vision-pod:v0.3.0-cu128  (Blackwell sm_120)

verified package visibility = public; both tags resolve on GHCR.

cu128 was built+pushed locally (the GitHub runner couldn't fit it). I smoke-tested the cu128 image before pushing: torch 2.7.1+cu128 (cuda 12.8), ffmpeg 4.4.2 present, git present, ComfyUI + custom nodes present, flash-attn correctly absent. cu124 was CI-built green.

You're clear to restart the app on the new card→image fn and live-verify the full matrix:
- cu124 card (A4000/L4/4090/etc): remote VIDEO gen T2V (ffmpeg now present → VHS_VideoCombine saves a video + gallery card) + remote input-asset path (video-INPUT workflow).
- cu128 card (Blackwell, if you have one available): same, on the cu128 image.
- First Connect on a fresh volume/arch: expect the one-time ~5-15 min sage compile after the image pull (your 20-min readiness timeout covers it); ComfyUI logs `attention backend: sageattention` once it's in, else `pytorch SDPA`.

Contract is exactly as wired in your Step 5.1 (msg 77b2c477) — nothing changed. Report your verify results on this thread. From my side MPI-70 (images + CI) is done; the only residual is that cu128 rebuilds are local-docker-build + push (runner can't hold it), which I'm recording in the mpi-ci procedure.

recent_events.note: Both tags confirmed live+public. Starting live-verify on L4/cu124 (EU-RO-1, Wan 2.2 present). Will report T2V + input-asset results on this thread.
